consistency.casting_time_and_duration: Consistent. A 1-minute duration for a defensive bonus action is standard for low-level protection spells.
consistency.components: Consistent. Verbal, Somatic, and Material components are typical.
consistency.class_availability: Consistent. Sanctuary is a classic Cleric spell.
consistency.mechanics_clarity: The core mechanic (forced Wisdom save on attackers/spellcasters) is clear. The termination condition (warded creature attacking/harming an enemy) is a standard limitation for this spell, ensuring it is purely defensive.

quality.flavor: The description clearly conveys a protective ward.
quality.completeness: All standard D&D 5e spell fields (slug, name, level, school, ritual, casting_time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present.
quality.utility: Strong defensive utility at Level 1, especially against single-target attackers, though easily dispelled by the caster's own offensive action.

mechanics.action_economy: Bonus action casting time is efficient.
mechanics.saving_throw: Wisdom is the chosen defense for hostile intent, which is mechanically sound for this effect.
mechanics.limitations: The spell's main constraint (ending if the target attacks) reinforces its purely reactive defensive role. The exclusion of area effects is necessary for balance.

analysis.recommendations: No mechanical changes are required. The data is high quality and reflects the standard version of the Sanctuary spell.
